title: Grassy Venezuelan Arepa Bake
description: A grassy, pillowy arepa bake featuring ginger cordial and ferment-jang, perfect for a weekend brunch.

ingredients.name: ferment-jang
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian markets or online

instructions: Mix together the cornmeal, ginger cordial, and ferment-jang in a large bowl.
Add 1 cup of warm water to the bowl and stir until the dough comes together.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and cook the disks for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they are lightly browned.
Transfer the arepas to a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until they are crispy and golden brown.
While the arepas are baking, mix together the remaining ingredients in a small bowl.
Once the arepas are done, top each one with the mixture and serve hot.
